Metadata.title: Hendrik Grau Investment | Buying Apartment Buildings Without Brokers
Metadata.description: Private investor for the direct acquisition of apartment buildings in NRW, Berlin and Brandenburg. No broker commission, fast execution, discreet handling and proven solvency.
Metadata.keywords: property acquisition, sell apartment building, no broker, private investor, NRW, Berlin, Brandenburg, Hendrik Grau, real estate investment, residential portfolio

Hero.subtitle: Your partner for discreet and direct property acquisition.

About.description_1: With more than 20 years of experience in the real estate market, we stand behind every acquisition. Our focus is on the acquisition and long-term holding of apartment buildings in NRW, Berlin and Brandenburg.
About.description_2: We understand the complexity and emotional value of real estate. That is why we guarantee a fair valuation, full discretion and a fast, transparent process.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.desc: More than 20 years of industry experience

Process.description: We reduce complexity to what matters most. A lean, transparent process from the first valuation to payment of the purchase price.

contact.title: Initial Contact
contact.desc: Send us the key details of your property. We review them promptly and confidentially.

valuation.title: Valuation
valuation.desc: Property viewing and market-based valuation within 48 hours.

offer.title: Offer
offer.desc: Based on the valuation, we submit a fair purchase offer free of commission.

closing.title: Closing
closing.desc: We arrange a fast notarized closing and a secure completion process.

locations.title: Locations
locations.desc: NRW (Münsterland, Ruhr region), Berlin and Brandenburg.

volume.title: Volume
volume.desc: Purchase value from €2 million up to €30 million

type.title: Property Type
type.desc: Apartment buildings and residential portfolios only

condition.title: Condition
condition.desc: From well-kept existing buildings to properties in need of renovation

size.title: Scope
size.value: Depending on location and development potential

Footer.copyright: © 2026 Hendrik Grau Investment. All rights reserved.

Contact.description: Do you own an apartment building or plot that fits our profile? Send us the key details or call us directly. We guarantee a discreet review.

errors.missing_document: Please add at least one document (exposé).

form.name: Name
form.message_placeholder: Property details such as address, year of construction, size...

DocumentUpload.description: Upload all relevant documents here securely and in encrypted form, for example rent rolls, floor plans or energy certificates, instead of sending them by email.
DocumentUpload.dropzone_title: Drop files here or click to browse
DocumentUpload.dropzone_subtitle: Supported formats: PDF, XLSX, DOCX, JPG (max. 50 MB)
DocumentUpload.success: Upload successful. We have received your documents.

Carousel.title: Selected Projects
Carousel.description: A look at selected projects and developments from our real estate portfolio.

purchase.title: Acquisition
purchase.desc: We focus on the fast and discreet acquisition of apartment buildings. Each property is reviewed carefully with a clear eye on location, substance and potential.

development.title: Development
development.desc: We develop sustainable concepts to increase the value of acquired properties and secure them for the long term for both the area and the rental market.

holding.title: Long-Term Holding
holding.desc: Maintaining properties over the long term and preserving them for future generations is a clear goal for us. Value retention and reliability remain at the center.

company_section.title: Grau Group
company_section.description: A strong group. We cover the entire value chain - from acquisition to long-term asset management.

broker_fees.question: Do I need to prepare documents?
broker_fees.answer: No, we guide you through the entire process and support you with every relevant step.

purchase_speed.question: What sets you apart from other buyers?
purchase_speed.answer: We are straightforward, solvent and quick to decide. Our goal is a fair and workable solution for everyone involved.

renovation_objects.question: Do you also buy properties in need of renovation?
renovation_objects.answer: Yes, absolutely. We specialize in property development and also acquire assets with maintenance backlog or vacancy.

t1.quote: Working with Mr. Grau was marked by absolute professionalism and reliability. The transaction was completed quickly and discreetly.
t1.name: Dr. Hans-Peter Müller

t2.quote: We value the transparent communication and fair valuation. We can recommend Mr. Grau without reservation.
t2.name: Sabine Schmidt

t3.quote: A partner on equal footing. The entire process was handled with maximum discretion and efficiency.
t3.name: Thomas Becker
